kept.text:
extended epoch 52 update @extendedapp 

+153 points | $257k volume | $210k open interest

another chill week.. remember:
cheap points > expensive size

extended is still one of the cleanest setups out there right now especially pairing it with pacifica

- execution costs = low + stable
- 8% apr on collateral via XVS
and the big one:
etoro partnership isn’t priced in yet... this unlock changes everything

suddenly this becomes one of the best venues to trade equities on-chain

mathematically, farming extended still makes sense considering upcoming partnerships

https://t.co/AAiDGg74qY

quoted_tweet.text:
extended epoch 51 update @extendedapp

+1164 points | $240k volume | $210k open interest

rotated trades consistently to farm funding - still the most efficient way to stay in the perps game without bleeding fees

it’s repetitive, not exciting, but funding offsets costs → points essentially come “free” if you stay disciplined

still pairing extended x pacifica, best combo for equity perps

extended situation update:
really impressed with how the team is executing and how fast the product is evolving

– @eToro + more integrations on the way → serious push toward “leveraged TradFi” dominance
– XVS is a strong bear market feature → deposit, earn solid apr, and loop it as collateral (clean stable farm)
– cross-chain collateral coming soon → big unlock for capital efficiency
– buybacks now confirmed, with $12M+ treasury already

the direction here is clear - building something much bigger than just another perps dex

....expecting more
https://t.co/AAiDGg7Cgw
